title: Weakened at home, Macron counts on 'his' last G7 to boost his diplomatic record
subhead: As his second term grows increasingly complex at home amid the killing of 11-year-old Lyhanna, the French president, who is chairing the G7 summit in Evian, is staking his legitimacy on an ambitious international agenda.

The Fed's Kevin Warsh faces first dilemma: Cut rates to please Trump or raise them to try to contain inflation
subhead: The new chair of the United States central bank is facing accelerating price hikes linked to the conflict in the Middle East, even as the president picked him in hopes that he would lower interest rates.

title: Air quality and global warming: Moving beyond an apparent paradox
subhead: For several decades, many countries have reduced air pollution, improving public health. However, the decrease in sulfur aerosols, particles that reflect the sun's rays, has intensified global warming.

title: Imprisoned French journalist wasn't at coach Deschamps's press conference. But a fellow reporter made sure his question was asked
subhead: Still behind bars in Algeria, Christoph Gleizes managed to ask a question to the national football team coach on Monday, through a fellow reporter, on the eve of France's first World Cup match against Senegal.

title: JR's new and improved Pont-Neuf cavern reopens
subhead: The artist announced on social media on Monday that his ephemeral work, 'La Caverne du Pont-Neuf,' was reopening three days ahead of schedule. It was repaired and strengthened after strong winds had damaged it two weeks ago.

title: Marjane Satrapi's comic strips for Le Monde, 20 years ago
subhead: Best known for her masterpiece 'Persepolis,' the French-Iranian graphic novelist and filmmaker, who died on June 4, published comic strips in issues of Le Monde's magazine.

title: At Dior, Jonathan Anderson is thinking long-term, not 'trendy'
subhead: One year after this arrival at Dior, the 41-year-old Northern Irish designer is still going at full throttle, releasing collections for Uniqlo and his own brand JW Anderson in addition to his 10 for the luxury label. His goal, he says, is to 'transform' the brand.
